title: OPC UA Machine Identification
description: JSON Schema for machine identification based on OPC UA Machinery v1.02 (IMachineVendorNameplateType and IMachineTagNameplateType). Simplified for MQTT payload use.

manufacturer.description: Name of the company that manufactured the machine (vendor-provided, read-only)

serialNumber.description: Unique production number assigned by the manufacturer (vendor-provided, read-only)

productInstanceUri.description: Globally unique identifier for this specific machine instance. Typically a URI combining manufacturer domain and serial number (vendor-provided, read-only)

manufacturerUri.description: URI identifying the manufacturer, typically the company's domain (vendor-provided, read-only)

model.description: Model name or designation of the machine (vendor-provided, read-only)

productCode.description: Manufacturer's product code or catalog number (vendor-provided, read-only)

hardwareRevision.description: Hardware revision level of the machine (vendor-provided, read-only)

deviceClass.description: Classification of the device type according to industry standards (vendor-provided, read-only)

yearOfConstruction.description: Year when the machine was manufactured (vendor-provided, read-only)

monthOfConstruction.description: Month when the machine was manufactured (vendor-provided, read-only)

initialOperationDate.description: Date when the machine was first put into operation (vendor-provided, read-only)

assetId.description: Customer-defined identifier for the asset within their organization (user-configurable)

componentName.description: User-assigned name for the machine in the plant context (user-configurable)

location.description: Physical location of the machine, such as plant area or building (user-configurable)

localizedText.description: Text with optional locale information. Can be a simple string or an object with locale and text properties.

oneOf.description: Array of localized text values for multiple languages
